title: serratula scabra
intro: Serratula scabra, also known as the rough milk thistle or milk thistle with prickly leaves, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as protecting the liver, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Serratula scabra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support liver health and overall well-being.
